indicators.name: Large open space
indicators.rationale: The large open space allows for a wide range of movement and positioning during yoga and stretching.

indicators.name: High ceiling
indicators.rationale: The high ceiling provides ample headroom for various yoga poses and stretches.

indicators.name: Natural light
indicators.rationale: The natural light coming through the windows can help set a calming atmosphere for yoga and stretching.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is ideally suited for yoga and stretching due to its large open space, high ceiling, and natural lighting.
